creator: jau@iki.fi
text:
Building Firefox 3.0.4 (port epoch 1) fails.
As its last output the build process gives this little complaint...

sed: /usr/ports/www/firefox3/work/mozilla/build/unix/*.pc: No such file or directory

For more details see the bzip2 compressed typescript of the build at...

http://www.oxit.fi/~jau/typescript.bz2

Fix: 

I do not have the foggiest idea really.
3/ty
How-To-Repeat: For better compatibility with the system in which the compilation fails try
building the package in an environment in which ACLs are enabled as shown
below...

/dev/mirror/gm0f    /usr     ufs     multilabel,acls        2 2
